title: Benchmark to manage and improve workplace performance
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Benchmark to manage and improve workplace performance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the need for benchmarking

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify benchmarking as a tool for achieving strategic goals in workplace planning processes.
